title: SDLC Workflow Artifact Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of every artifact produced by the sdlc-workflow plugin. Each artifact is a markdown file under .ai/workflows/<slug>/ (or .ai/simplify/, .ai/profiles/ for off-pipeline outputs). The frontmatter block (between the leading `---` markers) is parsed as YAML and validated against the matching branch of `oneOf` selected by the `type` field.

iso8601.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Templates emit values like '2026-05-11T14:30:00Z'.

runId.description: Compact timestamp run-id used for ship runs, simplify runs, and profile runs.

slug.description: kebab-case workflow slug. Must match the parent directory name.

base.description: Fields shared by every workflow artifact.

regenerable.description: When true, the renderer treats this artifact as a view over other state. Sub-commands may overwrite freely; the calm-reader surfaces a `regenerable` badge. Added in v9.20.0 as part of the additive-write contract.

refs.description: Cross-references between artifacts. Free-form: keys are role names, values are filenames or arrays of filenames.

designContractFrontmatter.description: 02c-craft.md — written by /wf-design craft as the implementation-facing visual contract.

rcaFrontmatter.description: 01-rca.md — root-cause analysis workflow produced by /wf-quick rca.

profileFrontmatter.description: Written to .ai/profiles/<run-id>/01-profile.md — standalone, no workflow slug.

shipLegacyFrontmatter.description: Deprecated 09-ship.md — no current writer emits this. Kept here so the validator does not reject historical files in old workflow dirs.

designAuditFrontmatter.description: 07-design-audit.md — measurable technical quality audit for implemented design.

projectContextFrontmatter.description: PRODUCT.md / DESIGN.md project-level context rendered under .ai/_view/project/.

siblingYamlSchemas.description: Schemas for sibling .yaml files that ride alongside a .md artifact to carry structured display data the renderer's fragment + figure-canvas builders consume. Validated by scripts/verify-fragment.mjs Check 7. Added in v9.20.0. Phase 2 (v9.21.0) added review-dimension for per-dimension review pages. Phase 3 (v9.22.0) added simplify-run, profile, benchmark, experiment, and instrument for off-pipeline simplify, profile, and generic augmentation artifacts.

review-dimension.description: Per-dimension review (07-review/<dimension>.yaml). One card per dimension; the combined 07-review.yaml still aggregates all dimensions, and the renderer cross-links the two. Added in v9.21.0.

five_whys.description: Optional collapsible drill chain rendered below the causal-chain figure. Each step ladders from the surface symptom toward the root cause. Phase 2 (v9.21.0).

lanes.description: Optional swim-lane projection for plans that span services. When present (or when an edge has kind=crosses-service), the renderer emits a data-flow lane figure instead of the per-module file topology. Added in v9.21.0.

design-critique.description: Sibling YAML for design critique fragments. Carries row-level findings so renderers can build critique tables without scraping prose.

design-audit.description: Sibling YAML for design audit fragments. Carries severity-graded violations and remediation status for renderer tables.

simplify-run.description: Sibling YAML for off-pipeline simplify runs (.ai/simplify/<run-id>.md). Drives the finding-table fragment introduced in v9.22.0 (Phase 3). Styled like the review fragment but at smaller scale: no verdict block, categorical chips (reuse/quality/efficiency) instead of severity, optional deltas summary.

deltas.description: Optional summary of proposed code deltas (file-level add/rem counts).

profile.description: Sibling YAML for off-pipeline profile/benchmark runs (.ai/profiles/<run-id>/01-profile.md). Drives the benchmark-comparison fragment introduced in v9.22.0 (Phase 3): hotspots table + before/after metric bars + optimization candidates list.

comparisons.description: Before/after metric pairs for the benchmark-comparison figure. When absent the figure is omitted.

benchmark.description: Sibling YAML for augmentation/benchmark artifacts. Drives the augmentation structured-result fragment (v9.22.0).

experiment.description: Sibling YAML for augmentation/experiment artifacts. Drives the augmentation structured-result fragment (v9.22.0).

instrument.description: Sibling YAML for augmentation/instrument artifacts. Drives the augmentation structured-result fragment (v9.22.0).
